Title: Successful user registration with valid data
Objective: Verify that a user can register successfully with valid data.
Preconditions: No existing account with the test email.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter valid First Name, Last Name, Email, Password, and Confirm Password.
3. Submit the registration form.
Test Data:
Input: John, Doe, john.doe@example.com, Password1!, Password1!
Notes: Ensure email is unique in the system.
Expected Result: User is registered successfully and a verification email is sent.

Title: Registration fails with already registered email
Objective: Ensure registration fails if the email is already registered.
Preconditions: An account already exists with the test email.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter valid First Name, Last Name, already registered Email, Password, and Confirm Password.
3. Submit the registration form.
Test Data:
Input: Jane, Doe, jane.doe@example.com, Password1!, Password1!
Notes: Email is already registered in the system.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating the email is already registered.

Title: Registration fails with invalid email format
Objective: Ensure registration fails if the email format is invalid.
Preconditions: No existing account with the test email.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter valid First Name, Last Name, invalid Email format, Password, and Confirm Password.
3. Submit the registration form.
Test Data:
Input: Alice, Smith, alice.smith@com, Password1!, Password1!
Notes: Email does not follow the correct format.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating the email format is invalid.

Title: Registration fails with mismatched passwords
Objective: Ensure registration fails if Password and Confirm Password do not match.
Preconditions: No existing account with the test email.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter valid First Name, Last Name, Email, Password, and mismatched Confirm Password.
3. Submit the registration form.
Test Data:
Input: Bob, Brown, bob.brown@example.com, Password1!, Password2!
Notes: Confirm Password does not match Password.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating passwords do not match.

Title: Registration fails with short password
Objective: Ensure registration fails if the password is shorter than 8 characters.
Preconditions: No existing account with the test email.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter valid First Name, Last Name, Email, and a short Password.
3. Submit the registration form.
Test Data:
Input: Charlie, Green, charlie.green@example.com, Pass1!, Pass1!
Notes: Password is less than 8 characters.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating the password is too short.

Title: Registration fails with missing required fields
Objective: Ensure registration fails if required fields are missing.
Preconditions: No existing account with the test email.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Leave First Name and Last Name empty.
3. Enter valid Email, Password, and Confirm Password.
4. Submit the registration form.
Test Data:
Input: , , valid.email@example.com, Password1!, Password1!
Notes: First Name and Last Name are required fields.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating required fields are missing.

Title: Registration with maximum length names
Objective: Verify registration succeeds with maximum length First Name and Last Name.
Preconditions: No existing account with the test email.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter 50-character First Name and Last Name, valid Email, Password, and Confirm Password.
3. Submit the registration form.
Test Data:
Input: Aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa, Bbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbb, max.length@example.com, Password1!, Password1!
Notes: First Name and Last Name are at maximum length.
Expected Result: User is registered successfully and a verification email is sent.

Title: Registration fails with numbers in name fields
Objective: Ensure registration fails if First Name or Last Name contains numbers.
Preconditions: No existing account with the test email.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter First Name or Last Name with numbers, valid Email, Password, and Confirm Password.
3. Submit the registration form.
Test Data:
Input: John123, Doe456, john.doe123@example.com, Password1!, Password1!
Notes: Names contain numbers which are not allowed.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating names cannot contain numbers.
